operator_note: Phase 82 operator acceptance: accepted as completed current-state success for the Phase 80 live demo under the deterministic local_file provider caveat. This acknowledges that deterministic verification is a bounded tripwire and does not prove autonomous AI coding, model-backed generation, semantic correctness in the strong sense, or production readiness.
verification_caveat: Deterministic verification is a bounded tripwire only; it does not prove semantic correctness, production readiness, or task adequacy in the strong sense.
provider_caveat: If the provider was local_file, this acceptance does not prove autonomous AI coding, model-backed generation, or runtime/model execution.
